summary: Card Upgrade Feature in Services Page - All tests passed (14/14 backend, 100% frontend). Card upgrade functionality correctly implemented: clients can upgrade membership cards (e.g., Silver to Gold to Platinum) by paying FULL price of new card via MoMo, cashback, or combination. Welcome bonus is credited upon successful upgrade.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review passed - upgrade endpoint properly validates: 1) Active card required, 2) Can only upgrade to higher tier, 3) Phone required when MoMo payment needed, 4) Cashback validation against balance
Frontend ServicesPage.jsx correctly receives 'client' prop from ClientDashboard.jsx (line 821-827) to determine current card type and available upgrades

test_client.note: Password set for testing - Production Test User

seed_data_creation: Set password for existing Production Test User client to enable testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Card upgrade feature fully working. Test client (Production Test User) has been upgraded multiple times during testing - currently on Diamond card. The upgrade flow works: Services page → Upgrade Card tile → Select higher tier → Optional cashback toggle → MoMo phone → Pay & Upgrade button.

mocked_apis_list: BulkClix MoMo API - PAYMENT_TEST_MODE was enabled for testing (now restored to false)

upgrade_flow_verified.step1: Client opens Services page from dashboard (Services button)
upgrade_flow_verified.step2: Clicks 'Upgrade Card' tile in services grid
upgrade_flow_verified.step3: Selects higher-tier card (shows full price and welcome bonus)
upgrade_flow_verified.step4: Optionally toggles cashback usage (shows available balance)
upgrade_flow_verified.step5: Enters MoMo phone number if payment required
upgrade_flow_verified.step6: Clicks upgrade button → MoMo prompt sent → Payment confirmed → Card upgraded
